subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! From the eternal realm, the true Sacrifice, like unto a sphere of fire, hath come forth from the City of Love unto the wicked ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم از عالم باقی قربانی حقیقی از مدینه عشق بمثابه کره نار نزد اشرار
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
